title: Turkish Court Ruling Means New Trouble for Erdogan’s Foes
summary_full: A surprise judgment replaced the leader of Turkey’s main opposition party with a former leader known for losing elections.
summary_public: A surprise judgment replaced the leader of Turkey’s main opposition party with a former leader known for losing elections.
